description: The WorldsDataFeed is a data feed that provides a list of worlds or sessions, depending on the settings.

fields.ListSessions: Whether to list sessions of worlds.
fields.MergeByWorldId: Whether to merge by world IDs. Used to make Component:MergedWorldDataItemInterface.
fields.MergeBySessionId: Whether to merge by session IDs. Used to make Component:MergedWorldDataItemInterface
fields.IncompatibleSessions: Whether to show incompatible sessions due to game version number/plugins.
fields.UserHosts: Whether to list normal user hosts.
fields.MinimumTotalUsers: List sessions that have more than this many users.
fields.MinimumTotalContacts: List sessions that have more than this many users that are contacts to the user.
fields.MinSessionAccessLevel: List sessions that have a session access greater or equal to this.
fields.MaxSessionAccessLevel: List sessions that have a session access less than or equal to this.
fields.MinUptime: A session has to be open for at least this long to be listed.
fields.MaxUptime: A session has to be open for less than this long to be listed.

usage: Used in the system of Data Feeds. This feed provides MergedWorldDataItemInterface as well as DataFeedEntity and DataFeedEntity as part of its feed.
